characters.description: The Unbound Autark of Nagast, a powerful territorial ruler traveling with a trusted company.
characters.name: Felix Nevarre

characters.description: Felix's loyal bonded companion and combat partner. He begins the book injured and trapped in a prolonged evolution within Felix's spirit.
characters.name: Pit

characters.description: A skilled dragoon heir, Felix's ally, and the voluntary partner of a diminished dragon.
characters.name: Vessilia Dayne

characters.description: A trusted frontline fighter in Felix's company who combines ice magic with chain weapons.
characters.name: Evie Aren

characters.description: A young Earth-born Unbound allied with Felix. His construction and necromantic abilities are supported by an undead companion.
characters.name: Beef

characters.description: Beef's surviving shape-changing undead companion, able to act independently of him.
characters.name: Beef's undead companion

characters.description: A guarded Earth-born Unbound fugitive with the ability to travel through stone. The Hierocracy hunts him.
characters.name: Archie

characters.description: A veteran commander, forge master, and practical adviser to Felix who begins the journey injured.
characters.name: Harn

characters.description: Felix's fire-mage ally, a specialist in sigildry, and Alistair's partner.
characters.name: Atar V'as

characters.description: Felix's ally, a force mage and inscriptionist, and Atar's partner.
characters.name: Alistair

characters.description: Nagast's learned chancellor and Felix's adviser.
characters.name: Karys Taiv

characters.description: A magical and diplomatic ally of Felix linked to the Cantus.
characters.name: Zara Cyrene

characters.description: A healer linked to the Cantus.
characters.name: Isla

characters.description: A devastating Unbound weapon controlled by the Pathless and sent against Felix's allies. Her strength makes her one of the Hierocracy's most dangerous battlefield assets.
characters.name: Imara

characters.description: A hostile deity that works through the Hierocracy and controls a devastating chosen warrior.
characters.name: Pathless

characters.description: A diminished dragon joined to Vessilia by a voluntary bond.
characters.name: Vessilia's bonded dragon

characters.description: Ancient stone guardians who accompany Felix's party as allies.
characters.name: Four Eidolons

characters.description: A badly injured former guild elder who accepts partial restoration from a Pathless zealot. The remaining cure is promised only after the elder completes a divine quest to kill Felix.
characters.name: Former Protector's Guild elder

characters.description: An elven Chanter traveling with Felix's party who can manipulate wards and bypass protected passages.
characters.name: Elven Chanter

characters.description: A separate, talkative will bound within Atar V'as. It urges aggression and drains his mental strength when he restrains it.
characters.name: Atar's inner flame

characters.description: A deity who grants Felix Nevarre access to an ancient shrine and speaks to him through a crushed corpse.
characters.name: God of change

characters.description: A dragoon leader among the disguised refugees who identifies herself as Vessilia's relative after fighting her.
characters.name: Vessilia's aunt

characters.description: A high-ranking dragoon officer among the refugees who treats Vessilia's voluntary dragon bond as a threat to dragoon authority.
characters.name: Dragoon captain

characters.description: Vessilia Dayne's father, the deposed ruler of Pax Rell, is alive in Hierocratic custody.
characters.name: Vessilia's father

characters.description: An allied ruler whose presence near the negotiations lends weight to Alistair's party.
characters.name: Deep King of the Abyssal Shores

characters.description: A dwarven Chanter traveling with Felix's party who helps catalogue recovered objects and identifies a concealed artifact.
characters.name: Dwarven Chanter

characters.description: A small mouse-shaped manifestation of immense ancient power, summoned to negotiate over a dragon's evolution. It remembers the old dragon pacts and judges the legacy of dragons and dragoons by a different history.
characters.name: Green Wilds spirit

characters.description: A local prince who requests a representative from Nagast.
characters.name: Local prince

characters.description: The provincial ruler's disillusioned commander. Seeking to preserve the province and its people, she proposes that Alistair help remove the ruler from power.
characters.name: Knight commander

characters.description: The Grandmaster Hieri occupying Pax Rell's citadel. A former warrior and close ally of the Hierophant, he is protected by an elite guard, a Grandmaster array, and a dense network of coercive oaths.
characters.name: Mivun Tal

characters.description: A deity tied to the shrine beneath Pax Rell's citadel who attempts to restore the damaged oaths before withdrawing.
characters.name: Goddess of fortune
